title: DENTAL SERVICES - 211info
text: ADVANTAGE DENTAL+ CLACKAMAS DENTAL SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Full-service private dental practice. Services include sealants and fluoride treatments, cleanings, cosmetic dentistry, dentures, dental restoration, emergency care, root canals, pediatric care, surgery, and periodontics. Services may vary by location. 13023 SE 84th Avenue Suite A Clackamas, OR 97015 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Thursday 7am-5pm, Friday 7am-4pm Email (503) 353-9992 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 353-9992 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for appointment FEES: Varies by service. Accepts most insurance plans, including Oregon Health Plan (OHP). DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable LANGUAGES: English, Spanish by arrangement AREA SERVED: Varies by site Services: Cavity Prevention Measures Cosmetic Dentistry Dental Hygiene Dental Prosthodontics Dental Restoration Emergency Dental Care Endodontics General Dentistry Oral/Maxillofacial Surgery Pediatric Dentistry Periodontics If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
